name: [Bondage Cult City]
description:
A freaky town where women are all forced into bondage by the authoritarian Church, for some reason.

Art by @rebake

There are rumors of a walled city filled with deviants and debauchery, and you my friend have wandered right in. Everyone says the place is cursed, a home to slavers and cultists - avoided like the plague.

Yeah so here in Firellia everyone is a total pervert - and all the women are kept bound and gagged. Cool? Cool. Obviously a lotta noncon and some wiLD patriarchal sTUFF so buckle up cuz this stuff takes place in ecchi world sorry.

You can sort of start wherever you like. Perhaps as a slave being brought into this, or an investigative journalist here to uncover the truth behind the rumors, and anything in between.

I have little doubt this could break and go horribly wrong, have fun!

Just sorta wanted to make a kinky choose your own adventure scenario loosely based on some rebake arts, cuz stuff is peak.

I wanted a sorta medieval fantasy setting - but of course with a heavy focus on long term bondage, exhibitionism and gags. This thing could just, completely fall apart and make no sense but I'll set it loose and see what happens anyways. Theres a princess to be rescued in there somewhere.

also leave feedback i wanna know what kinda stuff u guys like an wanna see more of - I’ve got like 10 bots im just sitting on lol
creator: neverlia
